name: Seeking Refuge In A... Cemetery?
description:
(Any!User)

I really went out of my comfort zone with this bot, so I hope it was worth it! Please leave criticism, thank you! ^‿^

12.4.25 UPDATE: Fixed an issue left behind from a previously copied template

DESCRIPTION / FIRST MESSAGE

{{user}} has recently lost their family after barely escaping a murderer. This murderer was quite well known, and was notorious for systematically killing families in neighbourhoods. Now {{user}} has to take refuge in the most unlikely of places...

A cemetery.

Specifically, it’s a cemetery known as Prendonbury Cemetery, known for being over four hundred years old. The path that {{user}} has entered is slightly windy, leading to a quaint - or before {{user}} found out what it was - mausoleum atop a small hill in the middle of the site.

The rest of the cemetery is surprisingly neatly ordered graves of different shapes and sizes, some being simple rounded headstones while others having crosses or plaques on them - though the filling of the graves seemed rather sloppy.

{{user}} was still shaken by the tragedy inflicted on them alongside the fact that they are still struggling to collect their thoughts and feelings afterward. However, for better or for worse...

They are not alone.
creator: Authogripsy
